description:
Generate a 3-step checkout form with fieldsets and legends for Shipping, Payment, and Review.
Require labels for all inputs, required+aria-required attributes, hidden non-active steps, and an <ol> progress indicator with aria-current="step" on the active step. Include labeled inputs with exact ids shipping-name, card-number, and review-terms (with matching label for= values). Do not use placeholder attributes on inputs.
